coffee_chat.subject: Undergraduate interested in your research
coffee_chat.body:
Dear Professor Ana,

My name is Maya Patel, and I am a junior majoring in Computer Science at the University of Utah. I am seeking undergraduate research experience related to machine learning and language models for healthcare and clinical text. I was especially interested in your work because your profile highlights research interests in artificial intelligence with a focus on natural language processing. Would you be open to a short conversation about your lab and how an undergraduate might get involved? My current background includes Python, PyTorch, scikit-learn, and I would be excited to contribute while continuing to learn.

Thank you for your time,
Maya Patel
